mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select case job when 1 then '班主任' when 2 then '讲师' when 3 then '学工主管' when 4 then '教研主管' when 5 then '咨询师' else '其他' end as pos, count(*) as num from emp group by job order by job
select case gender when 1 then '男' when 2 then '女' else '其他' end as name, count(*) as value from emp group by gender order by gender
